**March Madness 2026 is just around the corner, with 31 NCAA men's basketball conference tournaments set to determine the auto bids for the prestigious tournament.**

## Context / Background
The NCAA men's basketball season is nearing its climax, with conference tournaments underway. These tournaments will decide the automatic qualifiers for the March Madness 2026 tournament, which is scheduled to take place in the coming weeks.

## Tactical Key Points / Stats Table
| Conference | Tournament Dates | Auto Bid |
| --- | --- | --- |
| ACC | March 10-14 | 1 |
| Big 12 | March 11-14 | 1 |
| Big East | March 11-14 | 1 |
| ... | ... | ... |

## Key Quote
> "The conference tournaments are a crucial part of the NCAA men's basketball season, providing an opportunity for teams to secure their spot in the March Madness tournament."

## What's Next? (Schedule)
The conference tournaments will continue over the next few days, with the Selection Sunday scheduled for March 15. The March Madness 2026 tournament will then begin on March 18.
